message:
feat(service): add Discover-driven topology updates to LoadBalancer

Implement update_from_discover() on LoadBalancer<S, T> where S: Eq,
enabling dynamic backend management from a Discover source. The method
polls the discover source for Change::Insert and Change::Remove events,
deduplicating inserts against existing backends by service equality and
removing backends by position match.

New helper backend_matches_service() compares a locked backend service
against an expected value. New DiscoverUpdateError type wraps discover
source errors.

New ScriptedDiscover test helper and tests verifying insert deduplication,
remove-then-reinsert, and error propagation from the discover source.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
